creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: beech
Date: Sat Jul 21 06:21:55 2012
New Revision: 301266
URL: http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/301266

Log:
  - Update to 2.3.1
  
  PR:		ports/169299
  Submitted by:	Alan Hicks <ahicks@p-o.co.uk>
  Approved by:	Maintainer Timeout (2+ Weeks)

Modified:
  head/mail/libsieve/Makefile   (contents, props changed)
  head/mail/libsieve/distinfo
  head/mail/libsieve/pkg-descr
  head/mail/libsieve/pkg-plist

Modified: head/mail/libsieve/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/libsieve/Makefile	Sat Jul 21 00:24:30 2012	(r301265)
+++ head/mail/libsieve/Makefile	Sat Jul 21 06:21:55 2012	(r301266)
@@ -6,19 +6,18 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	libsieve
-PORTVERSION=	2.2.6
+PORTVERSION=	2.3.1
 CATEGORIES=	mail
-MASTER_SITES=	SF
+MASTER_SITES=	http://cloud.github.com/downloads/sodabrew/libsieve/
 
 MAINTAINER=	mark_sf@kikg.ifmo.ru
 COMMENT=	A library for parsing, sorting and filtering mail
 
+LICENSE=LGPL21
+
 GNU_CONFIGURE=	yes
-CONFIGURE_WRKSRC=${WRKSRC}/src
 CONFIGURE_ARGS+=--prefix=${PREFIX}
 USE_GMAKE=	yes
-BUILD_WRKSRC=	${WRKSRC}/src
-INSTALL_WRKSRC=	${WRKSRC}/src
 USE_BISON=	build
 USE_LDCONFIG=	yes
 

Modified: head/mail/libsieve/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/libsieve/distinfo	Sat Jul 21 00:24:30 2012	(r301265)
+++ head/mail/libsieve/distinfo	Sat Jul 21 06:21:55 2012	(r301266)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (libsieve-2.2.6.tar.gz) = dce45d73fba98afbffc6fbb6743b3f727cd41d5d3b09ac398a0cb90b21e7f0f0
-SIZE (libsieve-2.2.6.tar.gz) = 564722
+SHA256 (libsieve-2.3.1.tar.gz) = 92c1550d97c74a3724e6fe4c9ac50593afa2e5240da539703388d505138594be
+SIZE (libsieve-2.3.1.tar.gz) = 579265

Modified: head/mail/libsieve/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/libsieve/pkg-descr	Sat Jul 21 00:24:30 2012	(r301265)
+++ head/mail/libsieve/pkg-descr	Sat Jul 21 06:21:55 2012	(r301266)
@@ -5,4 +5,4 @@ you to make it so. libSieve makes no att
 IMAP, or anything else work; just how to parse and deal with a buffer full of
 emails. The rest is up to you!
 
-WWW: http://libsieve.sourceforge.net/
+WWW: http://sodabrew.com/libsieve/

Modified: head/mail/libsieve/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/mail/libsieve/pkg-plist	Sat Jul 21 00:24:30 2012	(r301265)
+++ head/mail/libsieve/pkg-plist	Sat Jul 21 06:21:55 2012	(r301266)
@@ -1,6 +1,12 @@
 include/sieve2.h
 include/sieve2_error.h
-lib/libsieve.a
 lib/libsieve.la
 lib/libsieve.so
 lib/libsieve.so.1
+lib/pkgconfig/libsieve.pc
+share/licenses/libsieve-2.3.1/LGPL21
+share/licenses/libsieve-2.3.1/LICENSE
+share/licenses/libsieve-2.3.1/catalog.mk
+@dirrm share/licenses/libsieve-2.3.1
+@dirrmtry share/licenses
+@dirrmtry lib/pkgconfig
